Description: Complete test suite for Property Service UI testing
Verify that Sell page requires user to be logged in
Verify that a logged-in user can create a property with valid data
Verify that creating property with missing required fields shows validation error
Verify that Buy page loads and displays property cards for sale
Verify that user can search properties on Buy page using the search bar
Verify that searching with non-matching term shows no results message
Verify that property detail page displays all property information
Verify that Contact Agent button works on property detail page
Verify that image gallery thumbnails work on property detail page
Verify that Back button navigates back to properties list
Verify that combining multiple filters works correctly
Verify that clearing all filters resets the property list
